mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls signals expanding aggregate income and consumption, which lifts corporate revenues and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns following month-over-month PAYEMS increases are not positive in more than 55% of instances over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate persistently above 7.0% indicates substantial slack in the labor market that suppresses wage growth and consumer spending, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: S&P 500 generates positive 60-day returns in more than 50% of months when UNRATE exceeds 7.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously rising industrial production and contained consumer price inflation indicate healthy supply-driven growth without monetary constraint, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when both conditions are met jointly.
failure_condition: The interaction term between INDPRO changes and CPIAUCSL changes exhibits a Rank IC below 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During the zero interest rate policy regime, accelerating retail sales signal demand recovery that is not being offset by immediate monetary tightening, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: In periods where FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%, positive changes in RSAFS fail to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp acceleration in consumer prices triggers expectations of near-term Federal Reserve tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rises more than 0.5% over 3 months
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns following a 0.5% 3-month increase in CPIAUCSL are not negative in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Back-to-back monthly declines in industrial production confirm a contraction in manufacturing activity that precedes broader earnings downgrades, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns following two consecutive monthly declines in INDPRO are not negative in more than 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of rising nonfarm payrolls alongside a falling unemployment rate confirms a genuine labor market tightening rather than a compositional shift, amplifying consumption expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE fails to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of joint-occurrence instances.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts above 900 thousand units signal robust residential investment and construction sector momentum, which spills over into broader economic activity and generates positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns when HOUST exceeds 900 are not positive in more than 55% of triggered instances.
